# nvinfer config — V1 detector (Ultralytics YOLOv8). STUB: tune on-device.
#
# Model & licensing: Ultralytics YOLOv8, fine-tuned on our 3 V1 detector classes
# (sheep/goat/poultry — tier 1-2 of configs/animals.yaml, the class-id source of
# truth; tier-3 rabbit/guinea_pig are V2, #90). labels.txt is generated by
# overwatch.inference.labels (detector_classes). AGPL-3.0, cleared under ADR-0007
# (non-commercial/AGPL). See docs/SOFTWARE_STACK.md "Models".
#
# Engine: built ON DEVICE from the fine-tuned YOLOv8 ONNX via TensorRT 8.5
# (network-mode=2 = FP16). Engines live under models/ (gitignored). The bbox
# parser comes from marcoslucianops/DeepStream-Yolo (NvDsInferParseYolo +
# libnvdsinfer_custom_impl_Yolo.so), installed on device.
#
# Asset paths below are CONFIG-DIR-relative: gst-nvinfer resolves model-engine-file
# / custom-lib-path / onnx-file / labelfile-path against THIS file's directory, not
# the process CWD (verified on-device, #84). On a fresh deploy
# scripts/target/57_stage_detector_assets.sh (#97) makes them resolve: it symlinks
# the DeepStream-Yolo parser .so into models/ and links configs/models -> repo-root
# models/, so `models/...` lands on the real engine + parser; labels.txt is committed
# alongside this file. Validated live on-device (#84): goat/poultry/sheep detected.

[property]
gpu-id=0
# net-scale-factor = 1/255 (normalize pixel 0-255 -> 0-1)
net-scale-factor=0.0039215697906911373
# model-color-format: 0=RGB
model-color-format=0
# onnx-file / model-engine-file: produced on device (see trt-model-conversion).
onnx-file=models/yolov8_farm.onnx
model-engine-file=models/yolov8_farm_fp16.engine
labelfile-path=labels.txt
# batch-size: raise for nvstreammux multi-stream (ADR-0006)
batch-size=1
# network-mode: 0=FP32 1=INT8 2=FP16
network-mode=2
# num-detected-classes: V1 detector tier 1-2 (sheep/goat/poultry); see labels.py detector_classes()
num-detected-classes=3
interval=0
gie-unique-id=1
process-mode=1
# network-type: 0=detector
network-type=0
# cluster-mode: 2=NMS
cluster-mode=2
maintain-aspect-ratio=1
symmetric-padding=1
# DeepStream-Yolo custom parser (installed on device):
parse-bbox-func-name=NvDsInferParseYolo
custom-lib-path=models/DeepStream-Yolo/nvdsinfer_custom_impl_Yolo/libnvdsinfer_custom_impl_Yolo.so

[class-attrs-all]
nms-iou-threshold=0.45
pre-cluster-threshold=0.25
topk=300
